label: CompTIA Security+ Applied Defense (Exam SY0-701)
description: CompTIA Security+ Applied Defense (Exam SY0-701) is a fully practical, scenario-driven study notes course built for hands-on cybersecurity operations and exam prep. You’ll work through step-by-step labs for defensive lab setup, zero-trust access control, pfSense, Snort, Suricata, Nessus Essentials, OpenVAS, cloud IAM, OSINT, phishing analysis, log hunting, and incident response using real-world tools, commands, and attack indicators.
